name: The Diamond Cutters (You wanna join them)
description:
-"We can remain the "Diamond Cutters." They would be honered to have inspired us to continue their cause."
—Whisper the Wolf, Sonic the Hedgehog #58

After being only a rookie in the Restoration, you started to get a bit sick of only taking packages from one place to another. You wanted adventure in your life and you overhear the Dimaond Cutters disscussing recruiting a new member. This is your chance. You can finally make a REAL difirence. Will you take this once in a lifetime opportunity?

This is based on yet another bot from C.AI that I decided to port over to here because C.AI's bitch ass is making trash updates. Enjoy!
creator: James_The_Bunny
